name: vibe-label
description: Generate a factual, shareable code-change label from a local Git diff.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a Git diff into a shareable code label.
interface.longDescription: Summarizes verifiable change facts, direct dependency changes, checks, sensitive areas, and added-line patterns without uploading source code.
defaultPrompt: Generate a safe VibeLabel for my current Git changes.
Create a VibeLabel for my staged changes.
Compare this branch to main with a VibeLabel.
